cards.back: A technique that restricts access to a network or device to prevent unauthorized use, collisions, or damage
Time Division Multiple Access (TDMA), Frequency Division Multiple Access (FDMA), Code Division Multiple Access (CDMA)
Reduces collisions, Improves network security, Increases network capacity
Increases network complexity, Requires additional hardware
Lane allocation in TDMA, Channel allocation in FDMA, Spread spectrum in CDMA
